vterm::ghostty/stream_terminal.zig::char: DEC Special Graphics (ESC ( 0) not translated — backtick renders raw instead of ◆. Real vterm V1 parity gap; graduate to an implementation bead.
xterm::ghostty/Terminal.zig::Terminal: i: xterm folds wrap+scroll at exact width differently than ghostty (got 'ab/cd/ef', upstream expects scrolled single column; the ghostty backend PASSES this case). Investigate converter vs engine semantics before blaming either.
vt100::ghostty/stream_terminal.zig::char: VT100-era engine: ESC ( 0 charset designator unsupported (leaks '0', no special-graphics translation). Era gap — @termless/vt100 is deliberately VT220-era; not a fix target.
vt100::ghostty/stream_terminal.zig::alt: VT100-era engine: DECSET 1049 alternate screen unsupported. Era gap — not a fix target.
vt100::ghostty/stream_terminal.zig::DECA: VT100-era engine: ESC # 8 DECALN unsupported (renders '8'). Era gap — not a fix target.
ghostty::ghostty/stream_terminal.zig::wi: ghostty-web's headless GhosttyTerminal exposes no title surface (no getTitle/onTitleChange; only the DOM-oriented Terminal wrapper has onTitleChange), so the backend's title tracking is init/reset-only. Upstream ghostty-web API gap — not fixable in the backend adapter.
